description: ETSI is a standards organization for information and communication technologies. Besides publishing standards and reference software, it hosts open-source projects such as OpenCAPIF and related API specifications for telecom and network-capability interoperability.
summary: ETSI exposes public developer surfaces through its OpenCAPIF project (Register API, Helper API, and example CLIs) plus machine-readable OpenAPI specs published on ETSI Forge; authentication for the OpenCAPIF sandbox is provisioned manually by the ETSI team.

surfaces.name: ETSI Forge NFV SOL005 NFVI Capacity Information API
